Task description explicitly specifies this directory path. Setup script creates and configures this directory. Export script references this directory.
Task description explicitly states: 'Save the flipchart as '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/growth_mindset_lesson.flipchart'.' This is a combination of verified filename and directory.
Task description explicitly specifies a 4-page structure: 'Page 1 - Title Page', 'Page 2 - Fixed vs Growth Mindset', 'Page 3 - The Power of Yet', 'Page 4 - Goal Setting'.
Task description, Page 1: 'Title 'Growth Mindset''. Export script checks for this text with grep -qi pattern.

Task description, Page 2, Fixed Mindset column: 'I can't do this'. Export script searches for this phrase case-insensitively.
Task description, Page 2, Fixed Mindset column: 'This is too hard'. Export script searches for 'too hard' substring.
Task description, Page 2, Fixed Mindset column: 'I give up'. Export script searches for this phrase.
Task description, Page 2, Growth Mindset column: 'I can't do this yet'. Also Page 3 discusses transformations ending with 'yet'.

pi_items.verified_value: I will keep trying when things get hard because...
pi_items.source: Task description, Page 4: 'add the prompt: 'I will keep trying when things get hard because...''. Export script searches for 'keep trying' substring.
Task description, Page 1: 'a large circle or oval shape representing a brain'. Only one such shape is required.
Task description, Page 2: 'Draw a vertical line to create a T-chart'. Only one such line is required.

Task description, Page 3: 'Add text showing at least 3 transformations' and 'Add an arrow shape pointing from the fixed statement to the growth statement for each pair.' This requires at least 3 arrows (one per transformation pair), not 1.
Task description, Page 4: 'Add a large star shape'. Only one such shape is required.

Calculated from task description: 1 circle (Page 1) + 1 line (Page 2) + 3+ arrows (Page 3, one per transformation) + 1 star (Page 4) = minimum 6 shapes total. The metadata requirement of 5 is insufficient.

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task requiring creation of a 4-page Growth Mindset Social-Emotional Learning (SEL) flipchart in ActivInspire format. The expected output file is growth_mindset_lesson.flipchart saved to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/. The flipchart must contain specific text content across four pages: Page 1 includes the title 'Growth Mindset' with a brain-shaped circle and subtitle about growth; Page 2 presents a Fixed vs Growth Mindset T-chart with contrasting phrases; Page 3 displays 'The Power of Yet' with transformation examples and arrows; Page 4 contains a goal-setting prompt with a star shape. Two metadata discrepancies were identified: the arrow count requirement is understated (metadata claims 1 arrow minimum, but the task description requires at least 3 arrows for the Page 3 transformations), and the total shape minimum is understated (metadata claims 5 shapes, but the actual minimum is 6 shapes).
